replacements.originalText: Context-aware, multi-line suggestions around your cursor based on recent edits
replacements.changeText: 基于最近编辑，围绕光标的上下文感知多行建议

replacements.originalText: Allow Tab to trigger while in a comment region
replacements.changeText: 允许在注释区域使用 Tab 触发

replacements.originalText: Suggest edits like new lines and indentation that modify whitespace only
replacements.changeText: 建议仅修改空白的编辑，如新行和缩进

replacements.originalText: Automatically import necessary modules for TypeScript
replacements.changeText: 为 TypeScript 自动导入必要模块

replacements.originalText: Enable auto import for Python. This is a beta feature.
replacements.changeText: 启用 Python 自动导入。此为测试功能。

replacements.originalText: Glob patterns for files where Cursor Tab will not suggest
replacements.changeText: Cursor Tab 不会提供建议的文件 Glob 模式

replacements.originalText: Accept the next word of a suggestion via Ctrl+RightArrow
replacements.changeText: 通过 Ctrl+RightArrow 接受建议的下一个词
